claim: The TI Morse / Relentless source pass is a receipt-backed field-scope intake: five requested videos and one bounded channel list were captured as source receipts, the field lanes are inferred integration hypotheses, and domain claims remain unverifiable until primary-source or replay evidence exists.
scope: Project Telos twenty-sixth-wave prooflesson for field-scope intake and source-to-proof-packet promotion
decision_summary: The packet verifies source-intake shape, claim-boundary wording, raw-payload exclusion, and a four-lane megatool integration map. It does not verify the domain truth of the video claims.
